test.command: test -f go.mod && go test -p 5 ./... || echo 'go.mod not initialized yet'

typecheck.command: test -f go.mod && go test -run '^$' ./... || echo 'go.mod not initialized yet'

lint.command: test -f go.mod && test -x ./.factory/bin/golangci-lint && ./.factory/bin/golangci-lint run --timeout 5m || echo 'lint unavailable before scaffold'

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `architecture.md` to record that deferred-head webhook runs preserve recovery context through `review_runs.hook_event_id` back to the stored `hook_events.payload`, so later recovery can resolve the real head SHA without collapsing distinct deferred triggers.

rejectedObservations.observation: The shared service manifest still starts the ingress API without a webhook secret, so workers validating authenticated `/webhook` flows cannot rely on `.factory/services.yaml` alone and must supply a manual environment override.
rejectedObservations.reason: Applying this would require mutating the existing `api` service entry rather than making an additive manifest change, which is outside the scrutiny worker's direct-update scope.
